roles.recommendation: Yes with flags — apply, frame LEGO consulting as MBB-equivalent
roles.summary_note: GTM Strategy & Ops role at Tier 1 EdTech (early childhood). Strong company fit but MBB consulting requirement is a hard screening gap.
gaps: 🔴 MBB consulting requirement (2-3 years McKinsey/Bain/BCG) — LEGO consulting is not MBB
🟡 AI/automation track record — JD emphasizes heavily, resume is light
🟡 Comp floor risk — range starts at $195K, below $200K hard floor
strongest_angles: Direct EdTech experience at Labster — rare for strategy candidates
GTM transformation: improved LTV:CAC, reduced cash burn — maps directly to role
Cross-functional operator: built OKRs, QBRs, operating rhythms — systems thinking
Strategy-to-execution arc from LEGO consulting to Labster operating roles

roles.recommendation: Yes with flags — apply with strong framing, warm intro preferred
roles.summary_note: Strategic AI partnerships role at privacy-focused consumer tech company. Strong comp and scope but needs dedicated BD/partnerships track record and AI ecosystem fluency.
gaps: 🔴 10+ years dedicated BD/Partnerships experience — Morten's is embedded in broader strategy/GM roles
🟡 AI/LLM ecosystem expertise — application-level exposure, not infrastructure/model layer
🟡 Consumer internet background — Labster is EdTech/enterprise SaaS
🟡 Complex product partnerships — Morten's partnerships are more GTM/distribution than product co-creation
strongest_angles: Led strategic partnerships at Labster — GTM and content partners, not sales deals
M&A and deal structuring depth: UbiSim acquisition, LEGO Ventures, $100M fundraise
Cross-functional leadership with Product, Engineering, Finance — matches DuckDuckGo model
Portfolio management from LEGO Ventures — competing/complementary relationship dynamics

roles.summary_note: Corp Strategy + Corp Dev VP reporting to CEO at a public medtech company. Exceptional comp but medical device industry experience required.
gaps: 🔴 10 years medical device / biotech senior leadership — zero medtech background, ATS risk
🔴 BS in Life Sciences or Engineering required — business background won't satisfy this
🟡 Advanced degree (MD/PhD) preferred — signals clinical leadership culture
🟡 50% travel requirement — significant, flag for discussion
strongest_angles: Currently leading Labster divestiture — live M&A sell-side process
LEGO Ventures: 5 early-stage investments end-to-end, buy-side diligence
Led $100M Series C & C+ — transaction structuring and buy-side relationships
VP/GM with CEO-level relationships and P&L ownership — not just a strategy advisor
roles.status_notes: Referral or direct outreach strongly recommended — medical device requirement likely filters cold applications

roles.recommendation: Apply — via referral or warm intro preferred
roles.summary_note: Full M&A lifecycle role at major consumer tech/gaming platform. C-suite access, remote-friendly, strong comp.
gaps: 🔴 5+ closed M&A deals incl. 2 >$50M — deal count may not meet traditional IB/PE bar
🔴 Financial modeling depth (DCF, LBO) — implies banking background
🟡 Gaming/digital media fluency — EdTech is adjacent but not the same
strongest_angles: LEGO Ventures: lead on 5 early-stage investments end-to-end
Currently leading Labster divestiture (live sell-side process)
Led $100M Series C & C+ fundraises — buy-side relationships and deal structuring
Cross-functional exec: ran strategy, ops, and P&L — not just a deal person

roles.summary_note: GM-type role owning a business line at a behavioral health startup. Strong scope but vague JD and location unconfirmed.
gaps: 🟡 Healthcare industry experience preferred — EdTech is mission-adjacent but different
🟡 JD is unusually vague about the actual venture and external partner
🟡 Location unconfirmed — verify before investing time
🟡 Labster 'scaling' story needs careful framing (450→150 headcount)
strongest_angles: UbiSim GM role is the direct analogue — business line ownership, 40% growth, external partners
Cross-functional leadership across product, GTM, ops at Labster
VP/SVP level + 5+ years people management ticks seniority bar
Mission-driven background (EdTech) signals genuine fit with purpose-led orgs
